title: Use more reliable check for rootless for firewall init
body:
We probably won't be able to initialize a firewall plugin when we are not running as root, so we shouldn't even try. Replace the less-effect EUID check with the rootless package's better check to make sure we don't accidentally set up the firewall in these cases.

Fixes #1685

@mheon @baude @rhatdan Can we draft a new release? This fix is the last missing piece to have rootless Podman on openSUSE Tumbleweed and Kubic.
Yes I think it is time for another release, although we are so close on a ARGS fix for buildah, it would be nice to get that patch into podman as well.  Lets see if we can get that in today.
and fwiw, the ARGS fix issues have been CI test issue fun, I believe the code itself is fine.
